name: sciple-mcp
description: Populate and manage Sciple platform content from Claude — environments, services, dashboards, runbooks, projects, tickets.
long_description:
MCP server for the Sciple Internal Developer Platform. Lets Claude bootstrap tenant structure, maintain the service catalogue, build observability dashboards, author runbooks, and manage projects + tickets without leaving the chat.

**Prerequisite:** before using this extension, run `sciple-mcp login --platform-url https://your.sciple.cloud` in a terminal once. That opens a browser, asks you to approve the agent, and caches an OAuth token in `~/.sciple/credentials.json`. This extension reads from that cache and auto-refreshes the token as needed — no API keys to paste anywhere.

For scripts and CI that still want a static credential, use a Personal Access Token under Profile → Access tokens (those are no longer accepted by this MCP server).

platform_url.title: Sciple Platform URL (optional)
platform_url.description: Only needed if you have multiple Sciple platforms cached. Leave empty to use the default platform from your sciple-mcp login. Example: https://your.sciple.cloud
